title: Update terminal titles

tasks.title: Implement terminal title identity policy and focused RED/GREEN tests
tasks.verification: RED: `pnpm exec vitest run src/events/events.test.ts src/events/terminal.test.ts` failed with expected `advance: addFeatureX`/project-prefixed title assertions. GREEN: same command passed with 70 tests after changing `buildTabTitle` active-change precedence and updating tests for active-only title, inactive fallback, whitespace fallback, no project prefix, sanitization, and status-churn no-retitle.
tasks.implementation_summary: Changed `buildTabTitle` so sanitized/trimmed active change ids take precedence over project names, falling back to project when no active change exists. Updated terminal title comments and focused events/terminal tests for raw active id, inactive project fallback, whitespace change fallback, no project prefix, active payload sanitization, failed emission retry, and status-churn no-retitle behavior.
tasks.notes: Implemented active-change precedence for terminal title identity and updated focused tests. Checkpoint commit 0ece7bb08f2fe9154bdf6b65527d4270a5512467.

attempts.error: Focused RED tests failed because runtime still emitted project-prefixed active titles like `advance: addFeatureX`.
attempts.diagnosis: Expected failure after updating tests before implementation; current formatter prioritized `projectLabel && changeLabel`.
attempts.fix_tried: Changed `buildTabTitle` precedence to return `changeLabel` before `projectLabel` and updated comments.

tasks.title: Add current docs/spec title-identity law and drift coverage
tasks.verification: RED: `pnpm exec vitest run src/handoff-footer-drift.test.ts` failed because `rq-titleIdentity01` was missing. GREEN: same command passed with 24 tests after adding `rq-titleIdentity01` to canonical spec and markdown mirror, adding drift assertions, and updating current tab-title docs/comments. Static searches: `project: advChange` has no matches; `Project: change-id` remains only in a negative drift assertion.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added `rq-titleIdentity01` to `.adv/specs/chat-output-display/spec.json` with scenarios for active change id, inactive project fallback, status-churn no-retitle, and title safety preservation. Updated `docs/specs/chat-output-display.md`, drift assertions in `handoff-footer-drift.test.ts`, and current tab-title prose in `ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.md` / `events/status.ts`. Preserved `rq-titleBell01` unchanged and left historical-only references untouched.
tasks.notes: Added title identity spec/docs law and drift coverage. Checkpoint commit d39bef140ec41699b5bc7e29cdcb329b8aef4208.

attempts.error: Focused RED drift test failed because `rq-titleIdentity01` was absent.
attempts.diagnosis: Expected failure after adding drift assertion before spec/docs law.
attempts.fix_tried: Added canonical spec requirement, markdown mirror, current docs update, and drift assertions.

tasks.title: Run final verification and contract/static safety audit
tasks.verification: Focused verification passed: `pnpm exec vitest run src/events/events.test.ts src/events/terminal.test.ts src/handoff-footer-drift.test.ts` (94 tests), static title audit passed, full `pnpm test` passed after remediating unrelated pre-existing drift failures surfaced by the first run, `pnpm run check` passed after formatting, `pnpm run build` passed, and `adv_change_validate strict:true` passed with non-blocking NO_DELTAS warning.
tasks.implementation_summary: Ran focused title/spec verification, static title safety/current-doc audit, full `pnpm test`, `pnpm run check`, `pnpm run build`, and strict ADV validation. First full test run exposed unrelated pre-existing drift failures (`adv-tron` lgrep remote index tool permission, advance-meta mirror test metadata, missing external citation for `rq-noSourceChecklistReads01`); applied minimal corrections so the full suite passes. Formatted `events.test.ts` to satisfy check.
tasks.notes: Final verification complete. Checkpoint commit b77901277067b699f6a9423d52052521a825c39a.

error_recovery.last_error: Initial `pnpm test` failed on three unrelated pre-existing drift tests; initial `pnpm run check` failed on Prettier formatting for events.test.ts.

attempts.error: `pnpm test` failed: adv-tron agent missing `lgrep_index_symbols_repo`, deploy-local test expected stale advance-meta v1.10 metadata, and spec citation invariant lacked external citation for `rq-noSourceChecklistReads01`.
attempts.diagnosis: Failures were unrelated to terminal title behavior but blocked AC8 full-suite verification; all were small drift corrections from prior archived work.
attempts.fix_tried: Added `lgrep_index_symbols_repo: true`, updated deploy-local assertions to v1.11/2026-05-22 and `rq-noSourceChecklistReads01`, and cited `rq-noSourceChecklistReads01` in ADV_INSTRUCTIONS.

attempts.error: `pnpm run check` failed on Prettier formatting for `src/events/events.test.ts`.
attempts.diagnosis: Test edits needed formatting after line wrapping.
attempts.fix_tried: Ran `pnpm exec prettier --write src/events/events.test.ts` and reran check.

wisdom.content: Full-suite verification can surface unrelated archived-change drift (asset allowlists, spec mirror metadata, citation invariants). Classify first; when failures are tiny structural drift blockers, repair minimally and record them in task error_recovery rather than weakening the requested verification bar.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved proposal checkpoint with reply: continue. Problem, scope, success criteria, constraints, and avoidances are captured in proposal artifacts.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery completed. User approved AC and agreement via `approve`. Agreement persisted and contract minted with 17 items. Duplicate `updateTerminalTitles` closed as superseded by user request.

design.approval_evidence: Design completed. Straightforward formatter-boundary design; independent validator verdict VALIDATED. No user-value tradeoff, unresolved conflict, or contract-compromise risk. Design persisted with implementation strategy, risk mitigations, and validator result.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep plan via inline Tier A reply: `approve`. Task graph has 3 tasks with TDD intent, dependencies, contract refs, and verification coverage. Strict validation passed with non-blocking NO_DELTAS warning.

execution.approval_evidence: Execution completed. All 3 planned tasks are done with checkpoint commits. Verification passed: focused title/spec tests (94 tests), static title audit, full `pnpm test`, `pnpm run check`, `pnpm run build`, and strict ADV validation. Non-blocking validation warning remains: NO_DELTAS.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered work via inline Tier A reply: `accept`. Contract review matrix has 17/17 rows passed/respected and executive summary is persisted.

items.text: Active change title format is exactly `<change-id>` after existing trim/control-byte sanitization.
Inactive title format is exactly `<project>` after existing trim/control-byte sanitization.
Project name is not prefixed when a change id exists.
Worktree path, git branch, trunk/main checkout, status marker, progress, blocked marker, and emoji are not included in title strings.
Tests cover active title, inactive title, empty/whitespace change id fallback, empty project with active change, sanitization, no-BEL/ST title output, and no status-churn retitle behavior.
Existing tmux, `/dev/tty`, and stdout fallback title emission behavior remains intact aside from title text.
Current docs/specs no longer describe the active title as `Project: change-id`; they describe `change-id` active fallback to `project` inactive.
Verification from `plugin/` passes: focused terminal/events/spec tests, `pnpm test`, `pnpm run check`, and `pnpm run build`.
Do not migrate to OpenCode `session.title` ownership in this change.
Do not change chat status markers.
Do not add Warp-specific rich styling assumptions; Warp title is plain text.
Do not rewrite historical changelog/research-pack entries that are clearly historical unless they claim current behavior.
Do not weaken existing no-BEL or control-byte sanitization guarantees.
Avoid heuristic title shortening, acronym generation, verb stripping, humanization, or model-derived title text.
Avoid exposing trunk/worktree mechanics in user-visible title strings.
Avoid replacing removed BEL behavior with OSC 9, OSC 777, or another ADV-owned terminal notification protocol.
Avoid using terminal title display metadata as authority for workflow correctness, security, permissions, persistence, gate completion, or spec compliance.

rows.evidence: Focused events/terminal tests passed; `buildTabTitle` active change returns raw change id and emitted active OSC payload is change id only.
rows.notes: Verified by tk-26267080ad36 and final focused tests.

rows.evidence: Focused `buildTabTitle` inactive test passed: no active change returns project name.
Focused terminal test asserts emitted active title does not contain `advance: addFeatureX`; static audit forbids current `Project: change-id` runtime wording.
Focused formatter tests cover ignored status emoji/prefix/progress and active output contains only change id; design/review found no worktree/branch/trunk title inputs.
Focused test suite passed: active, inactive, whitespace fallback, empty project active, sanitization, no-BEL/ST, and status-churn no-retitle coverage.
rows.notes: `pnpm exec vitest run src/events/events.test.ts src/events/terminal.test.ts src/handoff-footer-drift.test.ts` passed (94 tests).

rows.evidence: No emission control-flow changes; terminal tests covering tmux argv safety, no-BEL/ST, failed emission retry, and stdout fallback passed.
`rq-titleIdentity01` added to canonical spec and markdown mirror; ADV_INSTRUCTIONS/status current wording updated; drift test passed.
rows.notes: Static audit found no `project: advChange`; `Project: change-id` remains only in a negative assertion.

rows.evidence: Focused tests passed; full `pnpm test` passed; `pnpm run check` passed; `pnpm run build` passed; strict ADV validation passed with NO_DELTAS warning only.
No `session.title` migration added; implementation remains in terminal formatter/emission path.
No status marker enum/semantic changes; only title docs/comment and existing test formatting touched.
No Warp styling/rich-title assumptions added; spec states plain title identity only.
Historical changelog/research-pack entries left untouched; only current docs/specs and runtime comments updated.
rows.notes: Reviewer explicitly said not to revisit historical CHANGELOG entries.

rows.evidence: `rq-titleBell01` unchanged; terminal no-BEL/ST/control-byte tests passed; static audit found no OSC 9/777 in terminal runtime.
Formatter remains trim-only with raw change id precedence; no humanization/shortening/model-derived text added.
No worktree/trunk/branch inputs added to title path; active title tests assert change id only.
Static audit checked terminal runtime for `OSC 9` and `OSC 777`; none added. No BEL replacement protocol added.
Title remains display-only metadata; no workflow/security/persistence/gate logic reads terminal title.
rows.notes: Reviewer approved and aligns with P33.

acceptanceCriteria: Active change title format is exactly `<change-id>` after existing trim/control-byte sanitization.
Inactive title format is exactly `<project>` after existing trim/control-byte sanitization.
Project name is not prefixed when a change id exists.
Worktree path, git branch, trunk/main checkout, status marker, progress, blocked marker, and emoji are not included in title strings.
Tests cover active title, inactive title, empty/whitespace change id fallback, empty project with active change, sanitization, no-BEL/ST title output, and no status-churn retitle behavior.
Existing tmux, `/dev/tty`, and stdout fallback title emission behavior remains intact aside from title text.
Current docs/specs no longer describe the active title as `Project: change-id`; they describe `change-id` active fallback to `project` inactive.
